# Review Rubric — Sprite Directional Review

## Criteria

1. **Silhouette readable at 64px** (weight: 3, pass/fail)
2. **Faction palette compliance** (weight: 2, pass/fail)
3. **Pose differentiation** (weight: 2, score 1-5)
4. **Style consistency with art bible** (weight: 3, pass/fail)

## Pass threshold: 80%
## Hard fail: silhouette_readable
